DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ZACHARY GOTTLIEB'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Appearances: Lisa D. Tandoc, Esq, of the Bradshaw Associates, P. C. (415) 433-4800, representing plaintiff and opposing party; (Counsel provided notice to other side of intention to appear and argue). No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Days to amend governed by Statute, unless Plaintiff's counsel gets a stipulation from the other side.(302/PHA/VC) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
